mnemonics: Hadoop Helps Humans Handle Huge Hashes
Big Data Brings Huge Insights Daily Always
keyPoints: History of Hadoop: 2005, US Census, Jonathan Ellis, Mitch Kahan
Why Hadoop? Handles petabytes, Scalable, Fault-tolerant
Why not RDBMS? Handles large amounts of unstructured data
RDBMS vs Hadoop: Schema-based vs Schema-less
Hadoop vs NoSQL: Distributed vs Distributed
Hadoop vs SQL: No joins, No partitions
